key_insights.insight: The biggest mistake in dating is seeking a clone; instead, look for someone who complements you.
key_insights.quote: The biggest mistake that people make in dating markets is they look for their doppelganger. They look for their clone. You shouldn't look for your clone. You should look for your compliment.

key_insights.insight: Wishing your partner was more like you is a relationship killer.
key_insights.quote: This is a relationship killer is that wishing that your partner were more like you is just a form of egotism.

key_insights.insight: Being in love, especially early on, is not statistically associated with happiness due to factors like jealousy and surveillance.
key_insights.quote: No, on the contrary, because being in love, especially in the early stages of being in love, is not associated with what we would associate with actual happiness.

key_insights.insight: In relationships, men's jealousy is triggered by sexual infidelity, while women's jealousy is triggered by emotional connection with someone else.
key_insights.quote: The most jealousy provoking thing for men is an image of their intimate partner having sex with somebody else. For women, it's an image of their intimate partner saying, I love you to somebody else.

key_insights.insight: Acts of kindness lead to more happiness than self-care.
key_insights.quote: They found that moral deeds were happier than moral thoughts and moral thoughts were happier than self-care.

key_insights.insight: Helping others gives a mood boost that lasts for days.
key_insights.quote: The ones helping sixth graders with their math will have a mood boost for days afterward.

key_insights.insight: Falling in love has a neurochemical cascade involving testosterone, estrogen, noradrenaline, dopamine and a dip in serotonin causing rumination.
key_insights.quote: After that, you see adip in serotonin, which is really interesting...that's when the infatuation part of the relationship really kicks in.

actionable_advice.advice: If feeling lonely, volunteer to help others.
actionable_advice.how_to: Find a local organization or cause you care about and dedicate some time to volunteering. Focus on contributing to something larger than yourself.

actionable_advice.advice: In dating apps, focus less on finding someone with the same preferences and more on finding someone who compliments you.
actionable_advice.how_to: Expand your search criteria and consider profiles of individuals with different interests and backgrounds. Be open to exploring new perspectives and experiences.

memorable_stories: CEOs being dismissed for inappropriate relationships with subordinates, wondering what went wrong.
The speaker's experience of being pulled into spirituality by his girlfriend and finding it fulfilling.
contrarian_claims: Being in love is not necessarily associated with happiness in its initial stages.
Dating apps are unsuccessful because people look for someone too similar.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 163: Happiness Expert Reveals The One Type Of Person You Should NEVER Date
